blockingIssues.description: Failure-path test `test_refreshAll_withPersistenceFailure_preventsCursorAdvance` still only asserts unchanged cursor state in read-only mode and does not prove the `if persistenceError == nil` guard in `UsageAggregator.refreshAll` actually prevented scheduled backfill execution.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit handoff/read evidence for `mission.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `.factory/library/architecture.md`, and `.factory/library/user-testing.md` before `followedProcedure=true` can be set.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Latest review for `m4-fix-backfill-commit-coupled-advancement-and-runtime-integration-tests` again found missing `user-testing.md` startup-read evidence despite `followedProcedure=true`, indicating recurring procedural drift.
